title: NutellaGrilledKimchi
description: This high-protein-friendly dish features a blend of bitter and crisp flavors from kimchi combined with the sweetness of Nutella, grilled to perfection for a nostalgic twist.

ingredients.name: Nutella
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality Nutella for the best flavor

instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Place the Nutella on a plate and press small slices into it. Use a fork or spoon to spread evenly across each slice.
Arrange the crispy kimchi slices on top of the Nutella, allowing the fat in the nutella to help them adhere better to the grill.
Season with salt and pepper if desired.
Drizzle a bit of oil on both sides of the kimchi slices for added flavor.
Grill the Nutella-kimchi slices for 2-3 minutes per side, or until nicely charred. Watch closely as the fat can cause flare-ups.
For an extra protein boost, sprinkle some bacon bits and Panko crumbs over the top before grilling.
